assumptions: aggregate_transcripts_by_model currently sums all trials equally; conditions with more trials outweigh conditions with fewer.
The fix: group transcripts by scenarioId (condition), compute per-condition per-value percentage, average percentages equally across conditions.
count.prioritized/deprioritized/neutral become fractional (sum to conditionCount for each value) — each condition contributes exactly 1.0 total.
sampleSize stays as trial count; new optional conditionCount field added.
Bradley-Terry (export-pairwise-outcomes.ts) is deleted in full — file is self-contained MCP tool, nothing else imports it.
analysisSemantics.utils.ts validator isNonNegativeInteger must be loosened to allow fractional non-negative values.
PairedRunComparisonCard.tsx stops displaying raw count — fractional values are not meaningful to users.
aggregate-logic.ts multi-run rollup is correct with new math: each condition already contributes 1.0 total per run, summing across runs preserves equal weighting.
Backfill: re-run aggregation on all historical analyses and overwrite stored JSON.
Silent rollout — internal tool, no user communication needed.
discovery.summary: Design fully settled via pre-spec discovery session. All decisions made by user before workflow init.
non_goals: Circumplex Heatmap, Models Confidence Heatmap changes
Any changes to how transcripts are classified as prioritized/deprioritized/neutral

parallel_analysis.note: Phases 3–10 are sequential by dependency. Within each phase, [P]-marked tasks in Phase 11 (T018, T019) run in parallel. No additional parallelism — Python changes must precede TypeScript consumer fixes which must precede preflight.
